description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


-  New: Added the Borsa İstanbul trade calendar with Hijri date support.
-  Improvement: Enhanced PDF importers for BNP Paribas, Bondora Capital, Boursorama, Credit Suisse, DAB Bank, DADAT, Debitum Investments, ING, Trade Republic, and WirBank.
-  Improvement: Securities performance view now keeps the selection when changing view settings.
-  Fix: Colorized the profit/loss column in base currency.
-  Fix: Corrected Finnish month name formatting in the UI.
-  Fix: Fixed incorrect excess return values in the performance heatmap.
